name: Chicken Giblet Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: Parsley flakes or Fresh parsley minced, 1 1/2 teaspoons
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the giblets and discard all fat pieces. Place in a large cooking pot with cold water and salt (to taste). Bring to a boil and simmer for about 25 minutes.
2. Add carrot, onion, celery, and tomato leaves to the pot. Simmer gently for an additional 30 minutes.
3. Remove the giblets and chop into small pieces. Return them to the soup. Add oatmeal and stir. Continue simmering for 5 minutes.
4. This recipe serves 6. Adjust salt if desired; unsalted tomato juice can be used for low-sodium diets.
5. Nutritional information per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGE, CHO: 7g, PRO: 5g, FAT: 1g, CAL: 56
